mapper.insert: insert into course_schedule (semester_id, course_id, teacher_id, classroom_id, class_ids, week_day, start_section, end_section, week_range, create_time, update_time) values (#{semesterId}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{classroomId}, #{classIds}, #{weekDay}, #{startSection}, #{endSection}, #{weekRange}, now(), now())
mapper.delete:
delete from course_schedule where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select cs.id, cs.semester_id, s.semester_name, cs.course_id, c.course_name, t.id as teacher_id, t.teacher_name, cr.id as classroom_id, cr.classroom_name, cs.class_ids, cs.week_day, cs.start_section, cs.end_section, cs.week_range, cs.create_time, cs.update_time from course_schedule cs left join semester s on cs.semester_id = s.id left join course c on cs.course_id = c.id left join teacher t on cs.teacher_id = t.id left join classroom cr on cs.classroom_id = cr.id where cs.id = #{id}
